scenario:
INVITE sips:[field1]@[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sips:[field0]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sips:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]; Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: sips:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TLS Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=sips:66070417@20.20.64.92 2 2 IN IP4 20.20.64.92 s=- c=IN IP4 20.20.64.92 b=TIAS:576000 a=activetalker:1 t=0 0 m=audio 5004 RTP/AVP 116 9 8 0 110 18 109 a=sendrecv a=ptime:20 a=rtpmap:116 OPUS/48000/2 a=fmtp:116 maxplaybackrate=16000; sprop-maxcapturerate=16000; maxaveragebitrate=20000; stereo=0; sprop-stereo=0; cbr=0; useinbandfec=0; usedtx=0 a=minptime:20 a=maxptime:20 a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000/1 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000/1 a=rtpmap:110 G726-32/8000/1 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000/1 a=rtpmap:109 telephone-event/8000 m=video 5006 RTP/AVP 100 98 b=TIAS:512000 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:100 H264/90000 a=fmtp:100 profile-level-id=640c1e;max-mbps=54000;max-fs=3600;packetization-mode=1 a=rtpmap:98 H264/90000 a=fmtp:98 profile-level-id=42401e;max-mbps=54000;max-fs=3600;packetization-mode=0 a=rtcp-fb:* ccm fir a=rtcp-fb:* nack pli a=rtcp-fb:* ccm tmmbr
ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=TCP SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
BYE [$1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] [last_Call-ID:] Contact: sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP CSeq: 3 BYE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
-->
